message:
refactor(web): replace manual response construction with centralized framework helpers

Migrate json_ok/json_err in error.rs and SseStream::into_response in sse.rs
to use json_response_with_status() and sse_stream_response() respectively,
eliminating duplicated header/body assembly logic introduced during the
Wave 4B FastAPI-to-native-HTTP migration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
